reply:
[[BLOCK:p_42]]
【Talent Discovery】Quickly identify personal strengths and suitable industries, and develop actionable transformation plans.

[[BLOCK:p_43]]
【Life Direction】Align with personal strengths to select development paths, avoiding wasted resources and pitfalls.

[[BLOCK:p_44]]
【Decision Guidance】Support critical decision-making and provide strategic direction in uncertain environments.

[[BLOCK:p_45]]
【Risk Mitigation】Identify life risks in advance, reduce chances of failure, and offer coping strategies.

[[BLOCK:p_46]]
【Breakthrough Barriers】Deeply connect with the subconscious to identify and overcome internal obstacles.

[[BLOCK:p_47]]
【Inner Growth】Unlock the three levels of consciousness and tap into inner potential.

[[BLOCK:p_54]]
Design Milestones

[[BLOCK:p_55]]
After graduation, held positions at Samsung, Tencent, and Lenovo, overseeing innovative product design and management.

[[BLOCK:p_56]]
Responsible for interaction design and user research in product innovation at Samsung R&D Center.

[[BLOCK:p_57]]
Led the design and review of innovative products at Lenovo R&D Center; Lenovo Group's Best Innovation Award for two consecutive years.

[[BLOCK:p_58]]
Appointed as a guest professor at Fudan University's School of Visual Arts.

[[BLOCK:p_59]]
In 2014, founded 集创堂: an organization combining education and corporate consulting, focusing on product managers, designers, and internet/IT professionals. Over years of development, it has collaborated with more than 2,000 designers across nearly all internet companies in China, serving over 100,000 students.

[[BLOCK:p_60]]
In May 2015, became a VIP Senior Consultant for Baidu Search, providing guidance on major design directions.

[[BLOCK:p_61]]
In 2017, became a design consultant for iResearch.

[[BLOCK:p_62]]
In 2018, appointed as an entrepreneurial mentor for Baidu Innovation Center.

[[BLOCK:p_63]]
In 2018, appointed as a mentor for Alibaba International Merchant Platform.

[[BLOCK:p_64]]
In 2019, appointed as a board member of Jiangnan University's School of Design.

[[BLOCK:p_65]]
In 2019, served as the overall project lead for the Yangtai Airport Service Design project.

[[BLOCK:p_66]]
Published the book "集创思维矩阵," focusing on how to bring growth vitality from a systematic perspective. Also explored the integration of psychology and design, as well as the creation of personality models for Chinese individuals.
